subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance of thy Lord's mercy unto His servant Qasim, that he may render thanks unto God, his Creator, and remain steadfast upon the path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر رحمه ربک عبده قاسم لیشکر الله بارئه و یکون علی الصراط
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
